topRepos.name: termostat-ethernet
topRepos.description: Termostat postavený na platforme Arduino s Ethernet shieldom Wiznet W5100 / modulom Wiznet W5500. Využíva teplotný senzor DS18B20 na OneWire zbernici. Arduino riadi výstup - relé na základe rozdielu cieľovej a nameranej teploty so zohľadnením hysterézy. Thermostat built on the Arduino platform with Ethernet shield Wiznet W5100 / module Wiznet W5500. It uses the DS18B20 temperature sensor on the OneWire bus. The Arduino controls the output-relay based on the difference between the target and measured temperature, taking into account the hysteresis.
